# RemoteDesk Project - Batch 19 Generated Files Manifest

This document lists all the files generated as part of Batch 19 for the RemoteDesk project. This batch focused on enhancing RemoteDesk with advanced features, improved performance, expanded developer tooling, and future planning.

*   `remotedesk/docs/session-recording-playback.md`
